title: USB C Cable(1M 3-Pack),USB to USB C Fast Charger Cable Nylon Braided,3A Fast Charging Type C Lead Compatible with iphone 15 16 Pro Max,Samsung Galaxy S22+ S21 S20 Ultra S10 S9 A20e A21s,Moto G7
features: ⍟ FAST CHARGING FOR USB-C DEVICES ⍟ -- You can benefit from the latest speed boosts these cable brings when charging your USB C device. It can deliver up to 3A of power, so fast charging won’t be a problem.

⍟ Enhanced Durability ⍟ -- Strong fiber, the most flexible, powerful and durable material, makes tensile force increased by 200%. Can bear 10000+ bending test. Premium Aluminum housing makes the cable more durable,nylon braided type c cable adds additional durability and tangle free.

⍟ Perfect Compatibility ⍟ -- This USB C Cable is perfect compatible with all current available USB C Devices : iphone 16, 16 Plus, 16 Pro Max, iphone 15, 15 Plus, 15 Pro Max, Samsung Galaxy S21, S21+, S21 Ultra, S20, S20+, S20 Ultra, S10, S10+, S10E, S9, S9+, S8, A32, A42, A51, A71, A52, A72, A20, A40, A50, A70, LG G5 G6 V30 V20, HTC 10/U12+ and other USB-C devices.

⍟ Certified Safety & High Quality Assurance ⍟ -- This USB-C cable has electronic safety certifications that comply with appropriate standards, you have no need to worry about this cable quality at all. Upgraded 3D aluminum connector and exclusive laser welding technology, which can ensure the metal part won't break.

⍟ What You Get ⍟ -- 3pack 1M USB C Charger Cables with 24-months worry-free warranty. We always strive to offer the best customer service and please don't hesitate to reach out if there is anything we can help you with, we have you covered.
description: Product Description DRLIPEW USB-C to USB 2.0 Cable Compatibility List: - Samsung Galaxy S8 / S8+ / S9 / S9+ / S10 / S10+ / S10e / S20 / S20+ / S20 Ultra / S21 / S21+ / S21 Ultra 5G - Samsung Galaxy A20 / A20e / A20s / A21s / A30 / A30s / A31 / A40 / A41 / A50 / A50s / A51 / A70 / A71 / A52 / A72 / A80 / A90 / A3(2017) / A5(2017) / A7(2017) / A8(2018) / A8+(2018) / A9(2018) - Samsung Galaxy Note 20 5G / Note 20 Ultra / Note 8 / Note 9 / Note 10 / Note10+ / Note10 Lite - Samsung Galaxy Tab S5E / Tab A7 10.4 (2020) / Tab S6 / Tab S6 5G / Tab S6 Lite / Tab S7 / Tab S7+ / Tab A 10.5 (2018) SM-T590, SM-T595 / Tab A 10.1 (2019) SM-T515, SM-T510 / Tab A 8.0 (2017) / Tab A Plus 8 / Tab S3 9.7 / S4 10.5 / Tab Active 2 - LG G9 / G8 / G8X / G8 ThinQ / G8S ThinQ / G8X ThinQ / G7 / G7 ThinQ / G7 One / G7 Fit / V20 / V30 / V40 / V40 ThinQ / V50 / V50 ThinQ 5G -Sony Xperia XZ / XZ Premium / XZ1 / XZ1 Compact / XA1 / X Compact / XZ2 / XZ2 Compact / XZ2 Premium / XZ3 / XA2 / L1 / L2 / L3 / L4 - Xiaomi Mi 10 / Mi 10 Pro / Mi 10 Ultra / Mi 9 / Mi 9T / Mi A3 / Mi Mix 2 / Mi 8 / Mi 6 / Mi 5 / Mi 5s / Mi 5s Plus / Note 10 / Note 10 Lite - Huawei P9 / P10 / P20 / P20 Pro / P20 Lite / P30 / P30 Pro / P30 Lite - Moto G8 / G7 / G6 and other devices with c-port Notes: This cable is USB-A to USB-C , NOT USB-C to USB-C. Support fast charging of samsung galaxy S20 5G/S20+/S21/S21+/Note 10, but need a USB-A QC2.0/QC3.0/AFC charger . (The original charger for the devices is a 25W USB-C PD charger). Support fast charging of Huawei Mate 30,Huawei P20 pro, but cannot support HUAWEI SuperCharge (SCP protocol 5V/4.5A or 4.5V/5A) Not support Oneplus DASH charging , Moto TurboPower Technology. Military grade material, Internal 21/28AWG thick tinned copper core wire with premium engineering. Improved construction techniques and materials makes the USB-C charger cable so durable even outlast your phone. Premium Nylon Braided USB C Charger cable with Tangle-free design makes your daily life more convenient.
